title: ellmer prices
description: Per-million-token pricing for LLM providers supported by ellmer

schema_version.description: Integer version of the data schema. Bump only for breaking changes (added, removed, renamed, or retyped columns). Updating row values does not require a bump. ellmer rejects cached data whose schema_version differs from the bundled data.

min_ellmer_version.description: The minimum version of ellmer required to use this schema. Used in the error message when a user's installed ellmer is too old to read the downloaded data.

data.description: Per-million-token pricing rows. Each row is one (provider, model, variant) combination.

model.description: Model identifier as used by the provider's API.

variant.description: Pricing variant, e.g. empty string for standard, 'batch' for batch API pricing.

input.description: Input token cost in USD per million tokens.

output.description: Output token cost in USD per million tokens.

cached_input.description: Cache-read input token cost in USD per million tokens.
